title: LightGen Simulation Framework
readme: This repository contains the complete simulation framework for the LightGen chip, built on PyTorch and the Angular Spectrum Method. It supports forward modeling, inverse design, and example datasets for MNIST/CIFAR-10. Suitable for both beginners and advanced researchers in diffractive optical neural networks. This is edited on 1640 20260129.

title: D²NN Experimental Dataset (Optical MNIST)
readme: This dataset includes raw optical measurements from our D²NN experiments on Optical MNIST. It contains input plane light fields, output plane intensity distributions, and corresponding labels. Available in .mat (MATLAB) and .npz (NumPy) formats, with 10,000 samples in total.
